title: EM on amendments to EU chemicals legislation (COM(2025)386)
body: "This explanatory memorandum is about a European Commission proposal for a Regulation of the European Parliament and of the Council on the European Chemicals Agency and amending Regulations (EC) No 1907/2006,  (EU) No 528/2012, (EU) Nn 649/2012 and (EU) 2019/1021,  It was submitted by Emma Hardy MP, Parliamentary Under-Secretary of State, Department for Envoronment, Food and Rural Affairs. "
